era: 1991-2002. Post-Hardcore. E=8 -- angular, dissonant, rhythmically complex, emotionally devastating. Olympia/Tumwater.

theory_nodes.concept: KILL ROCK STARS THIRD CONSECUTIVE DEGREE (276-278). Bikini Kill (276), Sleater-Kinney (277), Unwound (278) all on Kill Rock Stars. No other label in the engine achieves three consecutive degrees. Olympia independent infrastructure documented at maximum density.
theory_nodes.description: Kill Rock Stars at three consecutive degrees -- the label's centrality to the Olympia scene.

theory_nodes.concept: OLYMPIA FOURTH CONSECUTIVE DEGREE (275-278). Beat Happening (275, K Records), Bikini Kill (276, KRS), Sleater-Kinney (277, KRS), Unwound (278, KRS). Four consecutive degrees from one small city. The Olympia chapter complete.
theory_nodes.description: Olympia's extraordinary concentration: four consecutive engine degrees.

theory_nodes.concept: Sara Lund: one of the most important drummers in independent American music. Rhythmically complex, physically committed, compositionally sophisticated. Makes Unwound's dissonant complexity cohere. Post-hardcore drumming at its highest level.
theory_nodes.description: Sara Lund as post-hardcore's most significant drummer.

theory_nodes.concept: 'Leaves Turn Inside You' (2001, Kill Rock Stars): double album, final statement. Angular post-hardcore gives way to spacious, atmospheric, devastating. 'September.' 'Below the Salt.' Sounds like an ending. 2002 dissolution confirms it.
theory_nodes.description: The final album as completed artistic statement.

theory_nodes.concept: Completed body of work: 1991-2002. No reunion. Seven albums. Closed arc. The records exist in the past tense. 'Leaves Turn Inside You' as ending confirmed by permanent dissolution.
theory_nodes.description: Unwound's completed arc and the significance of no reunion.

theory_nodes.concept: E=8 in the post-hardcore register: angular, severe, accumulative, dissonant. Different from Bikini Kill E=8 (political, cathartic) and Sleater-Kinney E=8 (ambitious, passionate). Three consecutive E=8 bands (276-278) in three distinct registers.
theory_nodes.description: E=8 as a register-variable designation across three consecutive degrees.

cross_references.relationship: Kill Rock Stars second of three consecutive. Olympia contemporaries and sonic contrasts. Sleater-Kinney: passionate, feminist rock. Unwound: angular, severe post-hardcore. Both E=8, entirely different characters.
Kill Rock Stars first of three consecutive. Riot grrrl vs. post-hardcore. Both E=8, both Olympia. The label connects three acts with three entirely different approaches.
Olympia first of four consecutive. K Records vs. Kill Rock Stars. E=5 lo-fi vs. E=8 post-hardcore. The Olympia chapter's full range: from lo-fi gentleness (275) to post-hardcore severity (278).

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=9. FIRST BALAENOPTERIDAE. Combined E=17. Forty tons airborne. Thunderous body percussion. Unwound's angular severity paired with the massive physical force of the first rorqual whale in the SPS catalog.
